response: The British rock band Dire Straits released the album *Brothers in Arms* in 1985, which also featured a song with the same title, "Brothers in Arms." The album was their fifth studio album and was released internationally by Vertigo Records, while in the United States it was released by Warner Bros. Records. The song, written in 1982 during the Falklands War, was originally released as the closing track on the album and later re-released in 2007 as a special edition to commemorate the 25th anniversary of the conflict.
